notes: Magical communal dining in a historic stone house with a garden, Georgetown. Format varies by night: à la carte Thu/Fri ($12-39 per item; starters ~$12-24, mains $27-39, desserts $14), a Saturday prix-fixe supper, and a Sunday supper. Seasonal/daily menu — sample dishes seen include Herby English Pea & Ricotta Spread, Chicken Leg Confit with Morels, Rhubarb Crostata, but no fixed published list. EXPERIENCE-ONLY: composer sells the garden/communal occasion + seasonal NW cooking, no fabricated dish list.
